title: Detour: authoring detail
summary: This slide is not part of the horizontal story. It exists to show how selected-slide authoring creates vertical depth.

signals.title: Anchor
signals.body: The detour belongs to slide 2 through deck.navigation.detours.

signals.title: Workflow
signals.body: Select a core slide, open add, choose the 2D detour option, and create the supporting slide.

signals.title: Return
signals.body: Press up to return to the parent core slide, then continue right.

signals.title: Scope
signals.body: The detour can carry detail without changing the core slide count.

guardrails.title: Parent must be core
guardrails.body: Only attach detours below slides that remain in the horizontal path.

guardrails.title: Use selection
guardrails.body: Create the detour from the currently selected core slide.

guardrails.title: Review rail
guardrails.body: Nested thumbnails should make the detour relationship visible.
